reasoning: XLK tech sector down -1.19% and XLF financials down -0.45% while XLE energy up only +0.35%. Tech's -1.19% weakness is especially significant given ~30% SPY weighting. Broad-based market decline (SPY -1.04%) is confirmed by sector leadership negative. Risk-off bias with medium-high confidence — sector internals align bearishly.
key_observations: XLK: -1.19% tech selloff is the primary downside driver; tech underperforming SPY
XLF: -0.45% financial weakness compounds bearish picture; both mega-cap leaders down
